name: kumbukum-browser-extension
description: Save URLs and notes directly to Kumbukum to share with your team and AI assistants.

scripts.build: export NODE_ENV=production && webpack --mode=production --config webpack.config.js && node pack.js
scripts.build:firefox: export NODE_ENV=production && BROWSER=firefox webpack --mode=production --config webpack.config.js && node pack.js firefox
scripts.start:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext run --source-dir build-firefox
